description_long: This is a classic high-top sneaker, predominantly black with white accents, including a white rubber toe cap, white laces, and a white midsole with a black stripe. The shoe features a canvas upper, metal eyelets for the laces, and a reinforced heel. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, blue, and red. The outsole is made of textured rubber, providing grip and durability. The overall design is iconic and widely recognized, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A black high-top sneaker with white laces, toe cap, and midsole, featuring a Converse All Star logo patch on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white toe cap, laces, and the symmetrical high-top shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain black canvas and the white midsole with a black stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel seam, white stitching, and the 'ALL STAR' branding on the heel tab.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the Converse All Star logo patch and metal eyelets for ventilation.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white with blue and red details
